---
title: "Pre-registered Report"
description: '<a href="final-project/pre-registered-report.pdf" download>Download PDF</a>'
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  typst:
    margin:
      x: 1in
      y: 1in
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
[Download PDF](pre-registered-report.pdf){.btn .btn-primary download="pre-registered-report.pdf" role="button"}
:::

Instructions for final project pre-registered report
